all_pages.title: We build digital solutions that grow your business

head.title: Universal components index — Arctic Web
head.description: Browse reusable Arctic Web components starting with the universal button.

universal_components_page.heading: Universal components
universal_components_page.intro: List of shared components with previews and links to source files.

button.name: Universal button
button.description: Flexible call-to-action with primary, secondary, and ghost styles.

select.name: Universal select
select.description: Accessible dropdown component with multiple variants and sizes.

switch.name: Universal switch
switch.description: Interactive toggle component for enabling and disabling options.

input.name: Universal input
input.description: Text input field for data entry with support for various types and sizes.

password_input.name: Universal password input
password_input.description: Password input field with visibility toggle functionality.

textarea.name: Universal textarea
textarea.description: Multi-line text input field with support for various sizes and states.

checkbox.name: Universal checkbox
checkbox.description: Component for selecting one or multiple options with state and validation support.

checkbox_group.name: Universal checkbox group
checkbox_group.description: Component for managing a group of checkboxes with shared state and validation.

radio_group.name: Universal radio group
radio_group.description: Component for managing a group of radio buttons with shared state and validation.

modal.name: Universal modal
modal.description: Accessible dialog component with portal rendering, focus trap, and animations.

badge.name: Universal badge
badge.description: Status indicator component with success, error, and warning variants.

alert.name: Universal alert
alert.description: Toast notification system with multiple statuses, positions, actions, and promise support.

tooltip.name: Universal tooltip
tooltip.description: Accessible hint popup built on Radix UI with smart positioning and minimal styling.

breadcrumbs.name: Universal breadcrumbs
breadcrumbs.description: Navigation trail component with Next.js routing, smart collapse, and accessibility support.

head.title: Full-Cycle Website Design and Development — Arctic Web
head.description: Arctic Web is a leading company in website and web application development. We craft custom, efficient, and reliable digital solutions tailored to your business needs.

welcome_page.heading: CodeBase — a shared library of universal components.
welcome_page.description: Here you'll find reusable elements and patterns that teams can use across their projects.

modal.title: Modal Title
modal.content: This is a universal modal component with accessibility features, animations, and portal rendering. Click outside, press ESC, or use the buttons to close.

alert.error_message: An error occurred while processing your request.

tooltip.long_text: This is a longer tooltip text that demonstrates text wrapping behavior when content exceeds the width limit.
tooltip.very_long_text: This is an even longer tooltip text with more detailed information. It shows how tooltips handle extensive content while maintaining readability and proper wrapping across multiple lines.

head.title: Universal Breadcrumbs Examples — Arctic Web
head.description: Explore UiBreadcrumbs component examples with various sizes, separators, and use cases.

breadcrumbs_page.heading: Universal Breadcrumbs
breadcrumbs_page.intro: Navigation trail component with Next.js routing, smart collapse, and full accessibility support. Explore different configurations and common usage patterns.

sizes.heading: Size Variants
sizes.description: Three sizes available: small (sm), medium (md), and large (lg). Choose based on your design hierarchy.

separator.heading: Custom Separators
separator.description: Replace the default chevron with any ReactNode: text, icons, or custom components.

collapse.heading: Smart Collapse
collapse.description: Automatically collapse long breadcrumb trails using the maxItems prop. First and last items are always visible.

patterns.heading: Common Patterns
patterns.description: Typical breadcrumb structures used across different types of websites and applications.
